word: G2793 - κινδυνεύω - kindyneúō - kin-doon-yoo'-o - Be in danger

sections.paragraph:
- Original: κινδυνέυω

- Transliteration: Kinduneuo

- Phonetic: kin-doon-yoo'-o

- Definition:

1. to be in jeopardy, to be in danger, to put in peril

- Origin: from G2794

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G2794; to undergo peril: - be in danger be (stand) in jeopardy.
